name: Emergency
description: Immediate surgery required to treat life-threatening or urgent conditions

name: Trauma
description: Procedure performed to treat traumatic injury

name: Revision
description: Procedure performed to revise or correct a previous surgery

name: Oncology
description: Procedure performed for treatment of malignant or benign tumors

name: Reconstruction
description: Procedure performed to restore anatomy or function following disease, trauma, or surgery

name: Diagnostic
description: Procedure performed primarily for diagnostic purposes

name: Therapeutic
description: Procedure performed to treat or alleviate a condition

name: Minimally Invasive
description: Procedure performed using minimally invasive techniques such as laparoscopy, arthroscopy, or endoscopy

name: Robotic
description: Procedure performed using robotic-assisted surgical systems
